content.en:
In a flash, thousands of tribulation times had passed in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

At this time, the human race gave birth to many strong invincibles, and there were many third-class invincibles, but second-class invincibles were still relatively rare.

And after thousands of eons of time, Ye Tian not only cultivated to the extreme of the Fivefold Peak Supreme, but also created an eternal technique, called the Shattered Void Sword, which fused various eternal rules, and was an incomparably powerful eternal technique, and much more powerful than the Shattering Finger.

Strictly speaking, the Shattering Finger is a finger that is meant to urge the power of the Eternal Realm, but it is actually not very powerful, and the Shattered Void Sword is the Eternal Technique that Ye Tian created for the purpose of conventional combat power.

He had also wanted to create a defensive or speed-based eternal skill, but he didn't think he needed it right now.

With the Endless Eternal Body, he far surpasses other supreme beings in terms of the degree of life-saving, so he does not need defensive eternal skills to save his life, and the speed eternal skills are not very needed, at least not as important as the offensive eternal skills.

"It's time to storm the Sixfold Supreme, I've stayed in the Fivefold Supreme for too long!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was now very sure of the Sixfold Supreme, so he didn't collect the resources to assist in the breakthrough.

Subsequently, he directly chose to impact.

After a long time, Ye Tian successfully broke the shackles and was promoted to the realm of the Sixfold Supreme, and his strength skyrocketed again.

After the Sixfold Supreme, it is really difficult to break through a realm in the future, and it is often not determined by talent, unless it is an innate eternal life, it is difficult to break the shackles, and it takes a long time and many resources to break the bottleneck.

For example, Tianlin Origin Ancestor, I don't know how many thousands of tribulations he has passed, and he has not broken through to the realm of the Sevenfold Supreme One so far.

Among the countless eternal heavens and earths of the Source Sea, there are many supreme beings below the sixfold supreme, but the number of supreme beings above the sevenfold supreme is very rare.

Any Sevenfold Supreme Being, its status is incomparably high, and almost all of them belong to the top existence in the Source Sea.

After Ye Tian became a Sixfold Supreme, he also knew that he would not be able to impact the Sevenfold Supreme Realm in a short period of time, and it would be very difficult.

However, he still needs to prepare for breaking through to the Sevenfold Supreme in the future.

this day.

He came to the Source God Pavilion as usual, and the transactions of the Source God Pavilion brought him a lot of benefits, and he often lacked any treasures, he could come here to trade, and he didn't need to spend a long time looking for something.

Abrupt.

The Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion announced that the Source God Pavilion was going to invite an inner member of the Circle Pavilion.

In addition to the Twelve Ancestors, there are 108 inner members of the Yuan God Pavilion below, and in addition to the inner members, there are a large number of outer members.

Peripheral members have no constraints and can trade freely, but many benefits are not available.

And the inner members can not only get the guidance of the twelve ancestors, but also have some special treatment and benefits, so everyone wants to become a member of the inner circle.

However, the number of inner members is almost fixed, and the number of 108 inner members does not change, unless another inner member falls, one of the outer members will be invited.

Of course, if you want to become an inner member, you still need to be assessed, and after the assessment is successful, you will become a real inner member.

......

"Master, I suggest that you become a member of the inner circle of the Source God Pavilion, the twelve ancestors know many secrets, and there are some resources that only the twelve ancestors know, and the previous master was invited to become one of the members of the inner circle. And in the Source God Pavilion, in addition to the Twelve Ancestors, the members of the inner enclosure also have some half-step Eternal Realms, but they are very low-key. "

The Machine Spirit suggested.

"Then give it a try!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian applied for the assessment of the inner members.

He thinks that with his current strength, he should be enough to serve as an inner member of the Source God Pavilion, right?

Genjin Pavilion.

After Ye Tian's application was approved, he immediately entered an assessment area.

Wow!

An Eightfold Supreme appeared in front of Ye Tian, this was an inner member of the Source God Pavilion.

"The Sixfold Being?"

The other party was a little surprised when he saw Ye Tian's cultivation realm, did a mere sixfold supreme person dare to apply to become an inner member of the Source God Pavilion?

The top members of the inner circle of the Source God Pavilion are the half-step Eternal Realm, most of them are Ninefold Beings, a few are Eightfold Beings, and only a few are Sevenfold Beings.

And the Sixfold Supreme has almost no precedent for members of the inner circle.

"Endless Ancestor, your assessment is to hold on to my attack for a minute, and if you succeed, you will enter the waiting list. The Twelve Ancestors will choose according to the battle situation of you applicants, and whether you can choose it depends on luck. After the other party finished speaking, he added: "By the way, my name is Wuyuan Ancestor!"

"Originless Ancestor, let's make a move!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Rumble!!!!

The two fought.

The Originless Origin Ancestor was good at boxing skills, and every punch unleashed a terrifying attack, which made the Void of the Source God Pavilion tremble.

In Ye Tian's eyes, the Originless Ancestor belonged to a very powerful Eightfold Primary, but it was not the top Eightfold Primary, just because the Originless Ancestor didn't even know a half-step Eternal Technique, but he was extremely proficient in many Peerless Techniques, and he could do whatever he wanted.

"Shattered Void Sword!"

Ye Tian held the top source weapon long sword, and with a single sword, he tore through the endless rules and landed on the body of the Originless Ancestor.

Boom!

The two turned out to be evenly matched.

No, it should be considered that Ye Tian has the upper hand.

At this moment, a sword mark appeared on the body of the Originless Ancestor, and it could not be dissipated.

"How is it possible, you have actually created an eternal technique! Moreover, you are only a sixfold supreme, and your combat power is even comparable to that of a top-notch eightfold supreme!"

The Originless Ancestor was shocked.

Ye Tian was not surprised at all, when he was a Fivefold Supreme, his regular combat power was enough to rival the weaker Eightfold Supreme.

Now, his cultivation has been upgraded to the realm of the Sixfold Supreme One, and his combat power is naturally terrifying, almost comparable to the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor since he was killed.

It's just that the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor has all kinds of powerful secret treasure weapons, and he doesn't have them, so his conventional combat power is still not comparable to the Nine Heavens Superior.

However, once he used the powerful fingers of the Eternal Realm, he was afraid that it would be enough to unleash a blow comparable to that of the weaker half-step Eternal Realm.

"Originless Ancestor, do you still need to fight?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course, I need to test your strength, this is also the rule set by the Twelve Ancestors!"

There is no origin ancestral road.

Thundered!!!!

The two continued to fight, Ye Tian's strength was indeed much stronger than that of the Originless Ancestor, and he had been suppressing the Originless Ancestor.
